payload.reason: daytime cloudburst dropped lux <150, lights spuriously came on at 06:01

payload.validation_plan: check automation reloads + sun condition active

payload.reason: morning automation set AC to cool with no off counterpart; ran 22h
payload.summary: Add evening AC-off automation for kantoor

payload.validation_plan: new automation appears in HA, climate.kantoor toggled to off

payload.reason: 4 outdoor lamps would force-on after blackout; aligns with the other 31
payload.summary: Normalize Hue outdoor lamp powerup from safety/on to powerfail/previous

payload.reason: sensor.thuis_buitentemperatuur / woonkamer_temperatuur flap; spamming logs
payload.summary: Add | default(0) guard to 6 templates in keuken dashboard

payload.evidence: 6 templates patched; later found | default(0) doesn't catch 'unknown' string -- needs float(0) follow-up

payload.reason: tablet repeatedly kicked to /auth/authorize; localStorage cleared across restarts
payload.summary: LLAT for Keuken Dashboard, inject into Fully Kiosk for zero-click login

payload.rollback: delete LLAT entries from auth; revert injectJsCode
payload.validation_plan: REST 200 with LLAT, tablet auto-loads dashboard

payload.reason: automation.reload sometimes leaves state inconsistent
payload.summary: Update /hacontrol skill: mandate HA restart after /config edits

payload.reason: trusted_networks experiment incompatible with Cilium L2 SNAT; honor existing DR memory

payload.evidence: LLAT still 200, tablet still on dashboard

payload.summary: Create /udmcontrol skill + memories about UniFi AAAA footgun and update-check policy

payload.reason: IPv6 → Cloudflare detour rejecting local_only kiosk auth
payload.summary: Add LAN-only keuken.bluejungle.net HTTPRoute on envoy-internal

payload.evidence: dig A=172.16.2.241, AAAA empty, HTTPS 200, XFF stays local

payload.reason: kiosk doesn't need admin; reduce blast radius if LLAT leaks
payload.summary: Demote Keuken Dashboard from Administrators → system-users (least privilege)

payload.reason: 110 restarts in 11 days due to compressed SRV record from CoreDNS

payload.validation_plan: pod rollout, 4 tunnel connections, no SRV errors, external GET 200

payload.reason: verify the CLI end-to-end
operationalize the ops portal
payload.summary: Add ops-dashboard-render (10m) + ops-digest (06:30) CronJobs in cluster-health

payload.validation_plan: manual job runs succeed, HTTP 200 on ops.html, HA persistent_notification arrives

payload.evidence: ops.html 200 12019 bytes, ops_digest HA notif 200, both CronJobs in observability ns

payload.reason: device powered back on; apply same LAN-only + LLAT pattern as keuken
payload.summary: Kantoor: demote user, add LAN-only hostname, push LLAT injectJsCode + startURL

payload.rollback: git revert + drop UDM static-dns entry

payload.reason: weekly scheduled posture scan

payload.validation_plan: findings appended as events; high-sev opens incidents
